reviews.review_description: I loved this game, I think I was a silver or gold but I try to join in 2026 and it just kicks me out, is this intentional or is it my headset?

I've been playing this game for a year at best and it's became my favorite game I tried to join in 2025 but no one was in the lobby I tried later 2025 and it didn't work so I left it alone for a couple of months and I came back this year to find out I can't play anymore because it kicks me out

So i download the game for the first time and i just keep getting the second i load up the game. And i kept on trying thinking it was a first time bug. I keep loading it up over and over again. When i stopped thinking it was never gonna work it made my background pure black. Chimplex devs...what are you doing?? Fix your game düd.

Mod baned me for yelling and getting mad at someone but there are people that say the n word and all the other bad words when there young and under the age limit and the mods don't even care. I really thought this was the best game on vr guess I was wrong about it. If I could rate it zero stars I would. I don't even know how long I'm baned for
got band for eleven years and six months by tthpigeon for doing the tracking glitch when my controller had been broken for more than a year.

This game got the wrong guy i got banned for like 10000 years for impersonating a mod and toxicity that I didn’t do like what the heck man someone unban me like bro.

Dude, I downloaded this game thinking that it was not gonna be very fun and boy was I wrong I can’t stop playing the game. It’s that fun. It’s like playing gorilla tag if it had better movement and we all know gorilla tag is really fun but if it has better movement, that’s even crazier. It’s really has a lot of creativity and I feel like everyone in the game knows each other so it just gives you, a type of Homie feel. my username is. Trodarkgojo and I am 20th on the worldwide leaderboard at least at the time that I’m writing this but yeah all I really have to say is this is a great game and five stars ￼￼

reviews.review_description: It’s a really good game especially it’s really easy to level up you can Probably get to lvl 150 in one day it’s that easy But I don’t like the new faces I liked the simple blurry pixel faces and I really don’t like the new over complex walls trees and so much more but the map in shop like the retro one really should be it’s own map or you could replace the low gravity space map with the one in shop but overall I’ma give it a 8.6/10￼
